title: Umami Greek Smoked Mackerel Wrap
description: A velvety, kid-friendly Greek wrap that blends smoked mackerel with warm yogurt sauce and herbs, served in a hot pot vessel for a comforting bite.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine Greek yogurt, minced garlic, chopped dill, oregano, lemon zest, and a pinch of salt; heat gently over low heat until warm but not boiling, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes.
In a skillet, heat a teaspoon of olive oil over medium heat and add the smoked mackerel fillets, cooking until the flesh is heated through and slightly caramelized, about 3 minutes per side.
Warm the pita breads in a dry skillet or microwave for 15 seconds to make them pliable.
Spread a generous spoonful of the warm yogurt sauce onto each pita, then top with the heated mackerel pieces.
Fold the sides of the pita around the filling, pinching the ends to secure the wrap.
Place the wrapped pita in the hot pot vessel, cover, and let the sauce seep into the wrap for 2 minutes.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with fresh chopped dill and a squeeze of lemon.
